current_implemented_build: V56.4 Core Trust Scoring Models MVP
patch_type: Core Trust Scoring Models MVP over V56.3 universal score contract
release_chain_status: V56.4 is the current implemented build. It loads after V56.3 in src/ui/v52-7-operational-layer.js. It adds the first seven Core Trust Scoring Models as inspectable, versioned model definitions while preserving the universal score contract, decision records, evidence register, model explanations, registry-rendered TrustMap, thick neon-blue CyberShield Core shield boundary, Purpose Protocol, and no-new-top-level-tabs rule. GitHub Pages browser QA is required after deploy.
top_level_tab_rule: Do not add more top-level tabs. Upgrade existing workspaces only.
version_label_rule: Build and version labels belong in Settings/admin metadata and repo documentation only. They must not appear as executive-facing dashboard content.
public_naming_rule: Public product name is CyberShield Executive OS. Current prototype build is V56.4. Do not call the public build CyberShield OS v8 unless the repo, README, loader, Settings/admin metadata, and public UX intentionally move to that version scheme.
controlling_doctrine: No score without a model. No model without evidence. No evidence without traceability. No action without consequence.
v56_4_changes: adds the first seven Core Trust Scoring Models
exposes model cards in Architecture, Evidence, and Proof Pack
adds model inspection modal with factors, weights, evidence standards, failure conditions, and runtime mapping
preserves V56.3 Universal Score Object and Score Band Contract
preserves V56.1 Evidence and Assumption Register
preserves V56 Trust Model Registry and Score Explanation Layer

core_trust_scoring_models.boundary: Prototype model definitions only. No live scoring, live claim extraction, live evidence retrieval, certification, legal determination, or production-calibrated scoring.

universal_score_contract.boundary: Static advisory prototype contract only. No live scoring, enforcement, evidence retrieval, certification, or production-calibrated scoring.

decision_record_hardening.boundary: Static advisory records only. No live approvals, ticketing, enforcement, evidence retrieval, banking verification, or compliance validation.

trust_model_registry.boundary: Demo-directional advisory models only. No certification, live evidence retrieval, legal determination, or production-calibrated scoring.

trustmap_interaction_layer.boundary: Static advisory navigation only. Does not create tickets, retrieve evidence, send notifications, or trigger live workflows.

internet_trust_engine_future_track.sequence_note: V56.4 defines models that support future Internet Trust Engine work, but does not implement live artifact analysis, live scoring, claim extraction, evidence retrieval, or internet verification.

recommended_next_build.label: V57 Model-Driven Proof Pack
goals: make Proof Pack pull from score contract

implemented_release_train.v56: Trust Model Registry and Score Explanation Layer
implemented_release_train.v56.3: Universal Score Object and Score Band Contract

prototype_boundary: The current GitHub Pages build is a lightweight static advisory prototype. It is not connected to live enterprise telemetry, SIEM, EDR, IAM, Microsoft 365, cloud control planes, GRC tooling, production agent enforcement, Google Sheets, CRM sync, ticketing, notifications, marketplace systems, ad platforms, domain-intelligence systems, identity verification systems, CMMC certification systems, healthcare compliance validation systems, banking/payment systems, live evidence retrieval, live scoring, live claim extraction, internet claim verification, or takedown automation.
known_limitations: Core Trust Scoring Models are prototype model definitions, not production-calibrated scoring engines
Model factors and weights are advisory defaults and require pilot calibration
V56.4 does not perform live scoring
V56.4 does not perform live claim extraction
V56.4 does not retrieve or validate live evidence
Decision records use static prototype data
Evidence states do not retrieve or validate live evidence
Internet Trust Engine is documented as a future requirement track but is not yet implemented
GitHub Pages browser QA required after deploy
